## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Mode: <!-- Demo / Supabase -->
- Browser: <!-- e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Android 14 -->

## Screenshots / Console Errors
If applicable, add screenshots or paste any browser console errors here.

## Additional Context
Any other information that might help.
